overview: Official website for the CSI (Computer Society of India) Student Chapter at Vignan Foundation for Science, Technology and Research University, Hyderabad. Features public-facing sections for events, team members, and a community gallery, plus an admin panel for content management.
features: Hero section with CSI and college logos
Events listing with dates and descriptions
Team roster with 17 pre-seeded members and their roles
Admin panel with login to manage events, team members, and gallery images
